hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *packages/engine/src/*) printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Engine source changed (packages/engine/src). Update docs/specs/engine-spec.md to match: the affected Part I requirement(s) (statement + file:line + test refs; add a new SC-<section>-<n> row for a new rule), the Part II narrative, and Appendix B/C if behaviour or test coverage changed."}}' ;; esac
